chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1236 of 2015 CP D 5227 of 2014 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.5457/2015. 2. For hearing of main case. 10.04.2025 Mr. Pervez Iqbal Kasi, advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Khalid Rajpar, advocate for the respondent No.2. Sardar Zafar Hussain, advocate for the respondent No.3. Mr. Muhammad Ahmed, Assistant Attorney General. Learned counsel for the respondent submits, under instructions, that the impugned demand subject matter of these two petitions will be withdrawn forthwith, subject to right to initiate any proceedings as may be permissible under the law. Learned counsel for the petitioner states that in view of the said representation, petitions may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Office is instructed to place a copy hereof in the connected file. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
